dependencies.pinnedReason: Moonshine STT interface is unstable; 0.1.29 is the last tested version

resolvedTransitiveDeps.override: package.json#overrides — malformed file:../vad-moonshine in upstream publish

dependencies.pinnedReason: VAD API is unstable; 0.0.30 has the onSpeechStart/onSpeechEnd API used by MoonshineSttEngine

browserRequirements.SharedArrayBuffer: required — Moonshine and VAD worklets use SharedArrayBuffer
browserRequirements.textFallback: When voice is unavailable (permission denied, unsupported browser, model load failure), ASA falls back to text input. The voice button is hidden when COOP/COEP headers are absent.

models.note: Model is loaded by moonshine-js internally; no direct URL needed. Cached by the library under Cache API key 'moonshine-model-tiny-en'.

ttsRuntime.name: sherpa-onnx via @runanywhere/web-onnx
ttsRuntime.note: TTS retained on RunAnywhere (@runanywhere/web-onnx + @runanywhere/web). STT and wake-word adapters have been removed; only RunAnywhereTTS remains. A future task will migrate TTS to a separate engine.

cspDirectives.workerSrc: blob: (required for VAD and Moonshine workers), 'self'
cspDirectives.connectSrc: self (model fetches go through Cache API)

cacheVersioning.strategy: Cache API keyed by model ID + version string
cacheVersioning.invalidation: On version upgrade, old cache entries are deleted by key prefix matching. No cache migration needed between 0.1.x versions.

policyChecks.unpinnedAssets: reject — all npm deps must use exact version pins for voice packages
policyChecks.unknownLicenses: reject — all licenses must be Apache-2.0, MIT, or BSD-style
policyChecks.missingChecksums: warn — sha256 required for all model binaries not served by library internals
